target.title: fix: fail closed for missing Google provider config
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #85042.

This narrows Google provider/model validation to the unsafe explicit mismatch case while preserving documented env-only Gemini auth.

A `google/gemini-*` model is still allowed when `models.providers.google` is absent, so `GEMINI_API_KEY` / `GOOGLE_API_KEY` setups keep working. If `models.providers.google` is explicitly present but points at a non-Google API such as `openai-responses`, OpenClaw fails closed before stream dispatch.

## Security impact

This prevents a Google model selection from being routed through a mismatched OpenAI-compatible provider config while preserving the existing env-backed Google provider contract.

The error message does not include configured API keys.

## Validation

Targeted tests:

```text
 RUN  v4.1.7 /home/rev/projects/openclaw-pr-85042-clean
 ✓  agents-core  ../../src/agents/provider-stream.test.ts (4 tests) 40ms
 ✓  agents-core  ../../src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/stream-resolution.test.ts (20 tests) 9ms
 ✓  agents-pi-embedded  ../../src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/stream-resolution.test.ts (20 tests) 20ms
 ✓  agents-support  ../../src/agents/provider-stream.test.ts (4 tests) 41ms
 Test Files  4 passed (4)
      Tests  48 passed (48)
   Start at  22:36:09
   Duration  4.02s (transform 1.27s, setup 382ms, import 3.12s, tests 110ms, environment 0ms)
```

Build:

```text
build exit=0
CLI bootstrap import guard passed.
OK: All 4 required plugin-sdk exports verified.
```

## Real behavior proof

behavior:
Run the OpenClaw CLI local embedded agent path with `--model google/gemini-3.5-flash` while `models.providers.google` is explicitly misconfigured as `api: "openai-responses"`.

environment:
Local OpenClaw source checkout from this PR branch. Isolated `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH` and `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR` were used.

steps:
1. Created a temporary OpenClaw config.
2. Configured `agents.defaults.model.primary` as `google/gemini-3.5-flash`.
3. Allowed `google/gemini-3.5-flash` in `agents.defaults.models`.
4. Configured `models.providers.google.api` as `openai-responses`.
5. Ran `openclaw agent --local --session-key proof-85042 --message proof --model google/gemini-3.5-flash --json`.
6. Confirmed OpenClaw failed locally with the provider/API mismatch error before dispatch.

evidence:

```text
behavior: run OpenClaw CLI local agent with google/gemini-3.5-flash while models.providers.google is explicitly misconfigured as openai-responses
environment:
  repo: /home/rev/projects/openclaw-pr-85042-clean
  head: 85dd459add
  node: v26.0.0
  pnpm: 11.2.2
  config: /tmp/openclaw-85042-proof.QGKoBm/openclaw.json

config excerpt:
{
  "agents": {
    "defaults": {
      "model": {
        "primary": "google/gemini-3.5-flash"
      },
      "models": {
        "google/gemini-3.5-flash": {}
      }
    }
  },
  "models": {
    "providers": {
      "google": {
        "api": "openai-responses",
        "apiKey": "[REDACTED]"
      }
    }
  }
}

command:
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-85042-proof.QGKoBm/openclaw.json OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-85042-proof.QGKoBm/state node ./openclaw.mjs agent --local --session-key proof-85042 --message proof --model google/gemini-3.5-flash --json

output:
^[[33m[agent/embedded]^[[39m ^[[33m[trace:embedded-run] core-plugin-tool stages: runId=619e6f6d-f5f1-4136-9658-fa167bc92a02 sessionId=ef746575-2cc7-4864-b821-2a0f7ca3bace phase=core-plugin-tools totalMs=5257 stages=tool-policy:329ms@329ms,workspace-policy:1ms@330ms,base-coding-tools:1ms@331ms,shell-tools:1ms@332ms,openclaw-tools:session-workspace:1ms@333ms,openclaw-tools:image-tool:81ms@414ms,openclaw-tools:image-generate-tool:0ms@414ms,openclaw-tools:video-generate-tool:0ms@414ms,openclaw-tools:music-generate-tool:0ms@414ms,openclaw-tools:pdf-tool:0ms@414ms,openclaw-tools:web-search-tool:0ms@414ms,openclaw-tools:web-fetch-tool:0ms@414ms,openclaw-tools:message-tool:3ms@417ms,openclaw-tools:nodes-tool:0ms@417ms,openclaw-tools:core-tool-list:5ms@422ms,openclaw-tools:plugin-tools:4825ms@5247ms,openclaw-tools:0ms@5247ms,message-provider-policy:1ms@5248ms,model-provider-policy:0ms@5248ms,authorization-policy:0ms@5248ms,schema-normalization:8ms@5256ms,tool-hooks:1ms@5257ms,abort-wrappers:0ms@5257ms,deferred-followup-descriptions:0ms@5257ms,attempt:create-openclaw-coding-tools:0ms@5257ms,attempt:tools-allow:0ms@5257ms^[[39m
^[[31m[diagnostic]^[[39m ^[[31mlane task error: lane=main durationMs=12387 error="Error: Google model "google/gemini-3.5-flash" cannot use models.providers.google api "openai-responses". Expected api "google-generative-ai". Configure the Google provider correctly or remove the mismatched provider config."^[[39m
^[[31m[diagnostic]^[[39m ^[[31mlane task error: lane=session:agent:main:proof-85042 durationMs=12391 error="Error: Google model "google/gemini-3.5-flash" cannot use models.providers.google api "openai-responses". Expected api "google-generative-ai". Configure the Google provider correctly or remove the mismatched provider config."^[[39m
Error: Google model "google/gemini-3.5-flash" cannot use models.providers.google api "openai-responses". Expected api "google-generative-ai". Configure the Google provider correctly or remove the mismatched provider config.

exitCode: 1
containsMismatchMessage: yes
containsExpectedGoogleApi: yes
reachedOpenAITransport: no
secretLeaked: no
```

observedResult:
OpenClaw fails locally through the CLI embedded agent path with a clear `models.providers.google api "openai-responses"` mismatch error. The proof also confirms `reachedOpenAITransport: no` and `secretLeaked: no`.

notTested:
A live request to Google Generative AI was not performed.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
